canonical_definition: The ability of an agent to learn how to perform a task by observing a human demonstration in a video and then applying that learned skill to complete the task efficiently.
papers: Adapt-$\infty$: Scalable Continual Multimodal Instruction Tuning via Dynamic Data Selection
VideoWebArena:  Evaluating Long Context Multimodal Agents with Video Understanding Web Tasks
